component.name: Connected
component.summary: Phone connectivity applet for the COSMIC desktop
Applet k propojení telefonu v prostředí COSMIC

description.p: Connected is a panel applet for the COSMIC desktop environment that provides phone-to-desktop connectivity using KDE Connect as a backend.
Connected je applet panelu pro prostředí COSMIC, který poskytuje propojení telefonu s počítačem pomocí KDE Connect jako backendu.
Connected requires KDE Connect to be installed on your computer, and the KDE Connect companion app on your phone.
Connected vyžaduje nainstalovaný KDE Connect na počítači a mobilní aplikaci KDE Connect ve vašem telefonu.

ul.li: Device battery status and connectivity monitoring
Sledování stavu baterie zařízení a stavu připojení
SMS messaging with conversation threads
SMS zprávy s vlákny konverzací
Smart SMS threading that merges conversations iOS reactions split into multiple threads on Android
Chytré SMS vlákno, které slučuje konverzace a reakce z iOS rozdělené do více vláken na Androidu
Media player remote control
Dálkové ovládání přehrávače médií
Desktop notifications for calls, messages, and file transfers
Oznámení na ploše pro hovory, zprávy a přenosy souborů
Ping your phone to find it
Pingnutí telefonu pro jeho nalezení
File sharing between devices
Sdílení souborů mezi zařízeními

screenshot.caption: Connected applet showing device page
Applet Connected zobrazující stránku se zařízeními

ul.li: Collapsible "Offline" device group: The device list now orders reachable devices first and tucks paired-but-offline devices into a collapsible "Offline" group.
Unpair offline devices without reconnecting: A paired device that's currently offline can now be unpaired straight from its device page.
About page: Shows the app version and links to the project homepage and issue tracker.
Notifications page explains KDE Connect duplicate toasts: A short hint and "Learn more" link explain why an incoming SMS or call can appear twice when KDE Connect's notifications are also enabled.
The message box grows as you type: The reply and new-message compose fields now expand vertically and wrap as you type. Enter sends; Shift+Enter inserts a newline.

Settings reworked into a focused "Notifications" page: View-state settings moved to the main UI; notification settings provide per-type (SMS, calls, file transfers) on/off toggles and privacy options.
Removed the "Show offline devices" and "Show non-mobile devices" toggles: Offline devices are handled by the new collapsible group; non-mobile devices are shown by default.
Battery percentage and the notification-count badge now always show.
Notification duration now follows your COSMIC system settings instead of a separate in-app slider.

New-message recipient picker polished: Recipients now show as compact wrapping pills, the contact-suggestion list is cleaner (deduplicated, capped, and shown below the recipients), and the missing text cursor in the recipient field is fixed.

description.p: Add Czech translation and update COSMIC dependencies.
SMS reaction-thread merging, structured journal logging, and cross-device cache scoping.

ul.li: Merged iOS-style reaction threads into their parent conversation so reactions no longer generate split threads
Added Settings toggle to control reaction-thread merging, with split/merge indicators in the conversation list and thread header
Routed applet logs to the systemd journal
Fixed cross-device SMS state contamination

description.p: Desktop and laptop peer support, pair-state reliability, SMS first-open truncation fix, and UI tightening.

ul.li: Added desktop and laptop peer support with inline share primitives and Enter-to-send on share-text inputs
Improved pair-state reliability via correct upstream D-Bus signal names and deferred-refresh handling for bursty signals
Fixed SMS thread truncation on first open with daemon-driven retry
Fixed message thread not auto-scrolling to newest message on open for cached threads
Added hover tooltips on the refresh, settings, and notification-dismiss icon buttons
Tightened device page layout: Pair/Unpair moved to the actions list, notification count rendered as a badge, accent color restricted to actionable UI

description.p: Native file chooser, SMS reliability improvements, Flatpak icon fix, and conversation list bootstrap hardening.

ul.li: Fixed conversation list bootstrap to handle cold-start, quiet-window settling, and late-arriving daemon cache data
Replaced rfd/gtk3 file dialog with libcosmic's native xdg-portal file chooser
Fixed SMS message handling with optimistic send and body-based reconciliation
Converted subscriptions to long-lived to fix premature termination
Fixed missing applet icon in COSMIC Panel settings for Flatpak installs
Fixed conversation list truncating the chevron for long message previews

description.p: MMS attachments, group messaging, and bug fixes.

ul.li: MMS attachment viewing with thumbnails in message bubbles
Multi-recipient support for new message compose
Fixed empty conversation list on cold start
Fixed APP_ID mismatch preventing applet from appearing on panel
